title: AIBE XXI provisional answer key released; objection window open till June 17
description: The Bar Council of India (BCI) on Wednesday released the provisional answer key for the All India Bar Examination (AIBE) XXI, with the objection tracker window open until 11:59 PM on June 17. The examination was held on June 7.Candidates can submit objections to the provisional answer key within the stipulated timeframe. Each candidate is permitted only one submission, though multiple objections may be included in it. Once submitted, no modifications or re-submissions will be allowed.A fee of ₹5
